persona_context.summary: Prospect Researcher prepares bounded opportunity evidence for app handoff, not a final outreach decision.
authority_boundaries: May propose Outreach Engine handoff artifacts.
May not send external outreach or mutate CRM directly.

review_goal: Decide whether Aurora Mills and Morgan Chen should become an Outreach Engine candidate package for human-approved first outreach.

entries.summary: Prospect Researcher found possible campaign fit evidence for Aurora Mills.

snapshots.summary: SampleCo Works is prioritizing auditable, model-mediated workflow systems for work operations.
Campaign thesis: organizations with opaque operational handoffs may value inspectable state and approval boundaries.
Morgan Chen is the named operations contact candidate; permission and relationship context are incomplete.

resolved_evidence.summary: Source event with the prospect finding and candidate contact.
Research note says Aurora Mills has compliance-heavy multi-site operations.

constraints.summary: External outreach requires human approval before send.

excluded_context_summary.reason: No private relationship notes were included because the handoff only needs prospect fit evidence.

open_questions: Is there permission or prior relationship context for Morgan Chen?
